DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-MS7-MSMATH7-AGS-GBL-01 | MS7 Math | Percent Problems | Academic Game Show | Global Perspectives

The World Round

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students doing?
2QUESTION 2: What kind of percent problem does the boy solve?
3QUESTION 3: What will the boy probably do next?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. Construct a full justification across all three answers. Name the activity type, the percent the boy solves, and the next step he asks about. For each, cite the specific evidence in the dialogue and explain the reasoning that links the evidence to the answer.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  CCSS 7.RP.A.3  |  MS Math Grade 7: Percent Problems
